headline: Enterprise Account Executive at Salesforce
snippet: Closing complex B2B deals in the enterprise segment. MEDDIC certified. Managing $2M+ pipeline.
note: straightforward enterprise AE

headline: Senior Customer Success Manager
snippet: Driving retention and expansion across 50+ enterprise accounts. CSM leader focused on NRR.
note: CSM — enterprise accounts is not enterprise sales

headline: SDR Team Lead | Outbound Specialist
snippet: Leading team of 8 SDRs. Cold outreach and pipeline generation. HubSpot and Outreach.io power user.
note: SDR with outbound signals

headline: Product Marketing Manager at HubSpot
snippet: Go-to-market strategy, competitive positioning, and sales enablement for mid-market segment.
note: PMM — product marketing literal in headline, demand gen and enterprise not present

headline: Revenue Operations Analyst
snippet: Building Salesforce dashboards, optimizing lead routing, and forecasting pipeline metrics.
note: RevOps with salesforce + forecasting

headline: VP of Customer Success
snippet: Leading CS org of 30 across EMEA. Focused on customer retention, upsell, and stakeholder alignment.
note: CS leader — stakeholder alignment implies but doesn't say stakeholder management

headline: Demand Generation Manager
snippet: Running multi-channel campaigns, ABM programs, and lead scoring. Marketo and Pardot certified.
note: demand generation literal in headline

headline: Technical Account Manager at AWS
snippet: Managing strategic accounts, driving product adoption, and handling API integrations for enterprise clients.
note: TAM — Account Manager is explicit stakeholder management; enterprise clients is not enterprise sales

headline: Business Development Representative
snippet: Cold calling and outbound prospecting for SaaS platform. Booking 20+ meetings per month.
note: BDR with outbound but not enterprise keyword

headline: Head of Sales Operations
snippet: Salesforce admin, pipeline analytics, forecast accuracy, and territory planning across 4 regions.
note: sales ops with clear salesforce + pipeline

headline: Client Success Director
snippet: Overseeing onboarding, adoption, and renewal for key accounts. Reduced churn by 15%.
note: key accounts + overseeing/renewal = explicit stakeholder ownership

headline: Account Manager — Enterprise
snippet: Managing relationships with Fortune 500 clients. Focused on expansion and cross-sell.
note: Account Manager is explicit stakeholder management; Enterprise alone not enterprise sales

headline: Growth Marketing Lead
snippet: Scaling acquisition channels, running A/B experiments, and optimizing conversion funnels.
note: growth marketing — no taxonomy coverage

headline: Solutions Consultant
snippet: Pre-sales demos, solution selling, and technical discovery for enterprise SaaS deals.
note: solution selling alias → consultative selling; enterprise SaaS deals in pre-sales context = explicit

headline: Partner Manager at Microsoft
snippet: Channel partnerships, co-sell motions, and partner enablement across APAC.
note: partner management — no taxonomy coverage

headline: Talent Acquisition Lead
snippet: Full-cycle recruiting for engineering and product roles. Built sourcing strategy from scratch.
note: HR/TA — none of the target skills apply

headline: FP&A Manager at Stripe
snippet: Financial planning, budgeting, and variance analysis for product and engineering orgs.
note: finance — no sales skills present

headline: Sales Enablement Manager
snippet: Building training programs, competitive battle cards, and onboarding for new AEs. Salesforce and Gong.
note: enablement — salesforce mentioned, no selling methodology keywords

headline: Customer Engagement Manager
snippet: Driving product adoption, customer health scoring, and QBR cadence for mid-market accounts.
note: customer engagement → customer success via concept forms

headline: Inside Sales Rep at Zendesk
snippet: Inbound lead qualification and consultative selling for SMB segment. Value selling trained.
note: ISR — consultative selling explicit, outbound absent (this is inbound)
